title: Decorline Homepage
summary: Built a modular single-page website with dynamically loaded sections for an Italian painting and decoration business.

title: Mobile Goal Tracker
summary: Developed an Android application for setting personal goals and tracking workout progress through structured local data persistence.
outcome: Delivered a functional multi-activity Android app with local persistence, progress visualization, and tested core logic.

title: Booking & Registry System
summary: Designed and implemented a full-stack booking and dietary registration system to replace manual scheduling processes.
outcome: Built a deployment-ready system centralizing booking data, improving operational planning accuracy and data management.
